SEARCH
Package javiergs.tulip.rtde

Class JointsData

java.lang.Object
javiergs.tulip.rtde.JointsData
public class JointsData extends Object
A container for the joint data of the robot, including actual and target joint positions, velocities, currents, voltages, motor torques, micro torques, and modes. Each array holds data for 6 joints (0 to 5).
Version:
2025-07-11
Author:
javiergs
